decisions.summary: HashiCorp model: open source CLI/SDK + SaaS + self-hosted
decisions.rationale: Maximize adoption via open-source core, monetize via SaaS and enterprise self-hosted

decisions.summary: Pluggable backends: FileBackend -> SQLiteBackend -> PostgresBackend same ABC
decisions.rationale: Single AbstractBackend ABC lets users scale without code changes

decisions.summary: API key format: ck_ prefix, SHA-256 hash stored only
decisions.rationale: Prefix enables grep-ability, hash-only storage means leaked DB doesn't expose keys

decisions.summary: Railway for SaaS hosting, Cloudflare/GoDaddy for domain
decisions.rationale: Railway has Django template, auto-deploy from GitHub, reasonable pricing

decisions.summary: Skip PyPI README-only publish — bundle with v0.7.0 SaaS launch
decisions.rationale: Avoid version churn, ship README + SaaS features together

decisions.summary: Django SaaS uses vaultit>=0.6.0 as SDK dependency
decisions.rationale: SaaS is a customer of the SDK, dogfooding ensures quality
